style_effects: Constant static sparks of electric blue and white streak across the body, crackling like miniature lightning bolts that fade into the air. A pulsing, vibrant yellow-orange aura surrounds Beedrill, shaped like concentric rings that pulse rhythmically with each movement, casting a warm yet energetic glow. The lighting mood is dynamic, with sharp highlights on the wings and tail that emit a radiant, electric-blue luminescence, creating a sense of constant motion and power. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
